description: Response body for GET /v1/census/baselines — lists all named census baselines registered in the CensusHistory baseline registry. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class CensusBaselineListResponse.

count.description: Total number of registered baselines. Equals len(baselines).

baselines.description: List of CensusBaselineItem entries (contracts.census_baseline_item), ordered by creation time ascending.
